task_completion.description: Agent reads the timecode sheet to determine split points and metadata.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the contents of /home/ga/Documents/chapter_markers.txt being displayed in a text editor or terminal (e.g., via cat or less).

task_completion.description: Agent splits the raw narration audio into four distinct chapters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent executing audio splitting commands (like ffmpeg with -ss and -t/-to flags) or using a GUI audio editor to export multiple segments from /home/ga/Music/raw_narration.wav.

task_completion.description: Agent sets the required audio properties (Mono, 64 kbps, 44.1kHz) and ID3 tags (Artist, Album, Title, Track).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing command-line flags (e.g., -ac 1 -b:a 64k -ar 44100 -metadata ...) or GUI export settings specifying the bitrate, sample rate, channels, and ID3 tags for the MP3 files.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the four required MP3 files in the delivery directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing chapter_01.mp3, chapter_02.mp3, chapter_03.mp3, and chapter_04.mp3 present in /home/ga/Music/audiobook_delivery/ (e.g., via a terminal 'ls' command or file manager).

task_completion.description: Agent creates the manifest.json file in the delivery directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the creation or existence of /home/ga/Music/audiobook_delivery/manifest.json.

task_completion.description: Agent populates the manifest.json with the correct metadata keys and values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the contents of manifest.json containing a JSON object with keys 'expected_files', 'expected_artist', 'expected_album', 'expected_bitrate', and 'expected_channels', matching the expected values.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually processed the audio file rather than creating dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine audio processing commands (e.g., ffmpeg, sox) or GUI audio editor usage, rather than 'touch' or 'cp' commands creating empty/fake MP3 files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the provided master recording.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that /home/ga/Music/raw_narration.wav is explicitly used as the input file in the processing steps.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually constructed or scripted the manifest.json.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent typing the JSON content in a text editor, using echo/cat commands, or running a script to generate it, rather than copying a pre-existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected metadata is: Artist: 'Sun Tzu', Album: 'The Art of War', Bitrate: 64000, Channels: 1.
